data.name: 間諜詐欺師
data.detailed_description:
✦ 故事 ✦


美貌、聰慧、機智集於一身的我———雪麗兒．米婭．克拉克，表面上是一位輾轉走跳於上流社會的富有名媛，實際上卻是個把富人（的銀行帳戶）當作肥滋滋的羊隻狠狠屠宰的詐欺師。這樣的我為了尋覓更好機會的、更大的舞台，千里迢迢從英國來到了自由之都———美國。

而在這次接近某一個「獵物」的計劃當中，碰到了我萬萬想不到的意外發展。我將之視為詐騙對象的富有董事長，竟然是個———真正的蘇聯間諜？！



在一連串的誤會之中最終被迫發現了這個秘密的我，為了保住小命，不得不假裝自己也是一名蘇聯間諜———等等，我還有個與生俱來的好用超能力可以作為秘密武器。只要滿足某個條件，我就能讀取對方的記憶來做為下一步的籌碼！而這個條件是⋯⋯⋯跟對方做愛？！

於是我就此展開了一場關於謊言、情慾、死亡交織於一起的鬥智劇。

我能活下來嗎？

而活下來之後的我⋯⋯⋯還會是原來的我嗎？

「本小姐可是演技超群的天才詐欺師，間諜什麼的———我就演給你看吧！」

✦ 玩法 ✦


主線劇情含有多次選項，不同的選項分別會累積【間諜值】與【淫蕩值】。
在累積數值的遊玩過程當中，如果選擇不慎角色也有可能會直接死亡。
而最終獲得的數值將會影響最終的結局發展。

✦ 遊戲特色 ✦


✧ 19 張基本 CG，包含差分高達 230 張以上
✧ 豐富的遊戲文本，總計逾 9 萬字
✧ 一位主要女角，兩位次要女角
✧ 兼具情慾刺激與幽默的劇情向
✧ 遊戲結局：總共 4 種不同結局

data.short_description: 在這款遊戲裡您將會扮演一位1960年代浪跡於頂流階層的超能力詐欺師———雪麗兒．米婭．克拉克。雪麗兒在接近某次的詐騙目標時，意外地發現了關於這位神祕男子的重大秘密，導致她陷入了難以脫身的複雜境地！為了從這種詭異的狀況裡逃脫，雪麗兒所選擇的方式竟然是⋯⋯⋯做愛？！
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 泰文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Master of Deception
data.detailed_description:
✦ Story ✦


I, Cheryl Mia Clark, was beautiful, smart, and witty. I looked like a wealthy lady who had my ways in the upper society, but, in reality, I was a fraudster who had slaughtered rich (people’s bank accounts) as if they were fattened sheep. In search of better opportunities and a bigger stage, I travelled all the way from England to America, the capital of freedom.

During my plan to approach a certain "prey", I encountered a shocking development that I never expected. The rich chairman of the board of directors, whom I had taken as the target of my fraud, was actually a real Soviet spy?!



After a series of misunderstandings, I was eventually forced to discover the secret, so I had to pretend to be a Soviet spy as well in order to save my life--Wait, I also had an innate superpower that could be used as a secret weapon. As long as a certain condition was met, I could read his memories and use them as leverage for my next move! And that condition was…to have sex?!

So I started a battle of wits in which lies, lust and death were all intertwined.

Would I survive?

And the me who survived…would she still be me?

"I'm a gifted fraudster, being a spy and stuff--I'll show you!"

✦ Gameplay Instruction ✦


The main storyline contains several choices, different choices will accumulate [Spy Value] and [Slut Value] accordingly.
During the process of accumulating the values, the character may die if the choice is not made carefully.
The final values will affect the final endings of the game.

✦ Game Features ✦


✧ 19 basic CGs, including more than 230 differentials
✧ Rich game text. Wordcount: ca. 90,000
✧ One main female character, two side female characters
✧ A drama with erotic excitement and humour
✧ Game ending: 4 types

data.short_description: Cheryl Mia Clark, a super-powered fraudster who was a member of the elites. As Cheryl approached the target of one of her scams, she accidentally discovered a great secret, dragging her into a complicated situation! In order to escape from this weird situation, Cheryl’s solution was…to have sex?!
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Thai, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
